description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is not logged in
AND the user is on the Browse Subscriptions page

steps.action:
WHEN focus is assigned to the Yearly/Monthly toggle
AND the user selects the toggle to toggle between yearly and monthly
steps.result: THEN the following statement should be spoken on focus and after each toggle, "<yearly_or_monthly> is selected. Press the select or OK button to toggle to <yearly_or_monthly> options. Scroll down to hear information about packages."
